body:
## Summary
- Adds a runtime-safe review question id guard before creating or grading review cards.
- Drops persisted cards keyed by unsafe ids during hydration.
- Uses recoverable JSON parsing so corrupt persisted review JSON records the same persistence warning path as storage read/write failures.
- Tightens daily review cap handling to require a strict Pro boolean and finite non-negative caps/usages.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/v1-1-review-store.test.js tests/content-spaced-repetition-schema.test.js --test-name-pattern "review store|questionId|unsafe key|__proto__|constructor|prototype|ensureCard|grade"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check`
title: Review store: guard runtime question ids
